text:

    Merge llvm-project release/14.x llvmorg-14.0.3-0-g1f9140064dfb

    This updates llvm, clang, compiler-rt, libc++, libunwind, lld, lldb and
    openmp to llvmorg-14.0.3-0-g1f9140064dfb.

    PR:             261742
    MFC after:      2 weeks
